name: ai-video-browser-shell
description: Electron-based tabbed browser shell for AI Video Pipeline — integrates automation pages as tabs instead of separate windows

scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && mv dist/browser-shell/src/preload.js dist/browser-shell/src/preload.cjs && mv dist/browser-shell/src/stealth-preload.js dist/browser-shell/src/stealth-preload.cjs && mkdir -p dist/browser-shell/src/renderer && cp -R src/renderer/. dist/browser-shell/src/renderer/
